functional_requirements: The system shall allow patients to register and create a personal profile with medical history.
The system shall allow patients to search for available doctors by specialization, date, and time.
The system shall allow patients to book, reschedule, and cancel appointments online.
The system shall allow doctors to view their appointment schedules for the current and upcoming week.
The system shall allow doctors to update appointment status as completed, cancelled, or no-show.
The system shall allow administrators to manage doctor profiles including availability and specialization.
The system shall send automated appointment reminders to patients 24 hours before their appointment.
The system shall generate daily appointment reports for hospital management.
performance_requirements: The system shall handle a minimum of 1000 concurrent appointment booking requests without data inconsistency.
The system shall complete appointment booking transactions within 3 seconds under peak load.
design_constraints: The system shall comply with HIPAA regulations for patient data privacy and security.
The system shall be accessible via web browsers and a dedicated mobile application.
All patient data shall be stored in an encrypted database with AES-256 encryption.
The system shall maintain an audit trail of all data access and modifications.
external_interfaces: The system shall integrate with the hospital's existing Electronic Health Record (EHR) system via HL7 FHIR API.
The system shall integrate with an SMS gateway to send appointment reminders to patients.
The system shall integrate with a payment gateway for consultation fee collection.
security_requirements: All patient data shall be encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3.
The system shall implement multi-factor authentication for doctor and administrator accounts.
Patient records shall only be accessible to the assigned doctor and authorized administrative staff.
The system shall conduct automated security vulnerability scans monthly and log all detected threats.
use_cases: Actor: Patient. Purpose: Book an appointment. Flow: Patient logs in, searches doctor by specialty, selects available slot, confirms booking, receives confirmation SMS.
Actor: Doctor. Purpose: View daily schedule. Flow: Doctor logs in, navigates to schedule view, sees all appointments for the day with patient details.
Actor: Administrator. Purpose: Generate appointment report. Flow: Admin logs in, selects report type and date range, system generates PDF report.
